signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
signals.text: USD/JPY at 159.41 — 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains bid; Middle East tensions introduce intervention risk on a break above 160.00. JPY COT LF short −65,309 (crowded carry). Carry dominates until VIX > 25; 160.00 is the key intervention threshold.

signals.title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: AUD/USD COT LF net long +41,675 vs ATM IV 9.5% near HV; 25d RR flat — options neutral. Positioning stalling at 0.7152; late-trend caution signal. A LF delta turning positive or AM reducing would invalidate the caution read.

signals.title: EUR — G8 Outperformance
signals.text: EUR leads G8 losers (+0.487% gap, 7 pairs); CAD +0.500% outperforming peers. EUR underperforms despite ECB steady stance; BoC meeting may reinforce CAD.

signals.title: GBP/USD — CB + Technical
signals.text: BoE 3.75% vs Fed 3.75% — 0bp GBP carry neutral; GBP/USD at 1.3528 mid-range. Positioning aligned with carry; next resistance 1.3600.

signals.title: NZD/USD — COT vs OIS Divergence + RBNZ
signals.text: NZD/USD COT LF net short −17,090 vs RBNZ hike 100% priced for 27 May. Short-squeeze risk elevated if RBNZ delivers hike; crowded spec short unwind targets 0.5900+. NZD/USD at 0.5883.
